name: anima-bridge
description: Bridges code-server / VS Code commands through the Anima gateway. Lets chat, CLI, MCP, and voice clients drive the editor (open files, read selection, watch active file).

scripts.package: bun run build && bunx @vscode/vsce package --skip-license --out anima-bridge.vsix

anima.gatewayUrl.description: WebSocket URL of the Anima gateway. Use wss:// for remote (Tailscale, public domain).

anima.gatewayToken.description: Bearer token for the Anima gateway (matches `gateway.token` in ~/.anima/anima.json). Leave empty when running unauthenticated locally.
